name: stratafy-core
description: Universal Stratafy connector — link a project to any Stratafy workspace (/stratafy:link), pull its foundation + key context and keep it in sync (/stratafy:sync), see link + telemetry (/stratafy:status). Auto-grounds every session: a managed CLAUDE.local.md block @-imports the cache AND carries a workspace-pin working rule so any Stratafy MCP operation in the folder targets the bound workspace — read and write both covered, zero ceremony. Workspace-agnostic (binding is data in .stratafy/link.json, no hardcoded ID); project-scoped, gitignored, never touches the user's CLAUDE.md.
